title: Kimi K2.6 and Agent Swarm explained..
summary: Kimi K2.6 is a language model released by MoonShot AI, described as an improvement over K2.5 with enhanced capabilities for coding tasks and agent swarm applications. The model is positioned as part of growing capability advances from Chinese AI laboratories.
